CustomField.description: Formula field. System-only. Concatenates CloseDate, Amount, Member Level, Membership Origin, and Id into a single text value used internally by rollup calculations to identify the most recent Opportunity. Do not add to page layouts.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: System field used internally by NPPatch rollup calculations. Not intended for display on page layouts.
CustomField.label: Combined Rollup Fieldset
